items.situation: student checking with TA about lab report requirements
items.speaker: How detailed does the report need to be?

options.A: Well, just cover the main results clearly.
options.B: The lab closes at six on weekdays.
options.C: I returned my library books this morning.

items.explanation: 说话人问“报告需要写多详细”。A 以话语标记 Well 开头，间接给出“把主要结果讲清楚就行”的建议，正好回应了详细程度，因此正确。B 谈实验室关门时间，抓住 lab 关键词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。C 说自己还了图书馆的书，与话题完全无关（离题）。D 回答的是截止日期，而不是“多详细”，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: student asking about gym or sports facility hours
items.speaker: Why's the gym closed so early tonight?

options.A: The new treadmills are on the second floor.
options.B: Beats me, maybe a staff shortage.
options.C: I already finished my chemistry homework.
options.D: Yes, you can bring a guest.

items.explanation: 说话人问“健身房今晚为什么这么早关门”。B 用习惯表达 Beats me（我也不知道）承认不清楚并猜测可能人手不足，是自然的口语应答，因此正确。A 只介绍跑步机在几楼，抓住 gym 关键词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。C 说自己写完了化学作业，与话题无关（离题）。D 回答的是能否带客人，属于是非问，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: student checking bus or shuttle schedule
items.speaker: Where's the campus shuttle stopping now?

options.A: I usually just walk to class anyway.
options.B: The shuttle was pretty crowded this morning.
options.C: Actually, right outside the main library.

items.explanation: 说话人问“校车现在停在哪里”。C 以话语标记 Actually 开头，直接给出地点“主图书馆门口”，因此正确。A 说自己一般走路上学，回避了地点信息（离题）。B 谈校车今早很挤，抓住 shuttle 关键词却没答停靠点（语义联想陷阱）。D 回答的是发车频率，而不是地点，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: friend inviting another to a study group or social event
items.speaker: What time's everyone meeting for the study group?

options.A: I lost my umbrella somewhere yesterday.
options.B: That course has a really heavy workload.
options.C: In the study room on the third floor.

items.explanation: 说话人问“大家几点集合学习”。D 以 Maybe 开头，间接建议“去群里看看”，把找到时间的办法给了对方，因此正确。A 说自己丢了伞，与话题无关（离题）。B 谈课程作业量大，抓住 study 关键词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。C 回答的是集合地点（三楼自习室），而不是时间，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: student asking about dorm maintenance issue
items.speaker: The heater in my room isn't working again.

options.A: Have you told the front desk yet?
options.B: My room gets plenty of sunlight actually.
options.C: The cafeteria changed its menu this week.
options.D: No, I don't have a spare key.

items.explanation: 说话人抱怨“房间暖气又坏了”。A 用反问“你跟前台说了吗”推动解决问题，是自然的口语回应，因此正确。B 说自己房间阳光充足，抓住 room 关键词却没回应暖气问题（语义联想陷阱）。C 谈食堂换了菜单，与话题完全无关（离题）。D 回答的是有没有备用钥匙，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: two classmates discussing a group project deadline
items.speaker: Can't we still finish the project by Friday?

options.A: I left my charger at home today.
options.B: We'll pull it off, no problem.
options.C: The project is about renewable energy.
options.D: Over in the engineering building, usually.

items.explanation: 说话人问“我们还能在周五前做完项目吗”。B 用习惯表达 pull it off（搞定它）给出肯定的安慰，推动对话，因此正确。A 说自己把充电器落在家里，与话题无关（离题）。C 谈项目主题是可再生能源，抓住 project 关键词却没回答能否完成（语义联想陷阱）。D 回答的是地点（工程楼），答错了问题类型。

items.situation: expressing concern about a friend's situation
items.speaker: You've seemed really stressed out these past few days.

options.A: The weather's been nice this whole weekend.
options.B: Stress is a big topic in psychology class.
options.C: Yeah, midterms have been rough lately.
options.D: No, I've never actually been there.

items.explanation: 说话人关切地说“你这几天看起来压力很大”。C 以 Yeah 承认并解释“最近期中考很折磨”，是自然的口语回应，因此正确。A 谈天气不错，回避了对方的关心（离题）。B 把 stress 变成心理学课上的话题，抓住关键词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。D 回答的是“没去过某地”，与语境完全不符，答错了问题类型。

items.situation: asking a neighbor about noise or shared space
items.speaker: Couldn't you turn the music down a bit?

options.A: That song is really popular right now.
options.B: I'm repainting my apartment this weekend.
options.C: The new speakers have amazing sound quality.

items.explanation: 说话人请求“你能把音乐调小点吗”。D 用习惯表达 Sure thing（当然）和 my bad（我的错）表示配合致歉，是自然回应，因此正确。A 说这首歌现在很火，抓住 music 关键词却没配合（语义联想陷阱）。B 说自己周末要重新粉刷公寓，与话题无关（离题）。C 夸新音箱音质好，同样是抓住声音相关词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。

items.situation: student asking a professor about office hours
items.speaker: When are your office hours this semester?

options.A: What day works best for you?
options.B: Right next to the main lecture hall.
options.D: The library keeps longer hours now.

items.explanation: 说话人问“这学期您的答疑时间是什么时候”。A 用反问“你哪天方便”推动约定时间，是自然的口语回应，因此正确。B 回答的是办公室位置（在大讲堂旁边），答错了问题类型。C 说自己喜欢今天的课，与提问无关（离题）。D 谈图书馆延长了开放时间，抓住 hours 关键词答非所问（语义联想陷阱）。

items.situation: student commenting on the dining hall line
items.speaker: This line for the dining hall's massive.

options.A: I finished my whole essay last night.
options.C: The dining hall added a new salad bar.
options.D: No, I haven't eaten there before.

items.explanation: 说话人感叹“食堂这队排得好长”。B 用习惯表达 Tell me about it（可不是嘛）表示强烈认同，是自然的口语回应，因此正确。A 说自己昨晚写完了论文，与话题无关（离题）。C 说食堂新增了沙拉吧，抓住 dining hall 关键词却没回应排队问题（语义联想陷阱）。D 回答“没在那吃过”，属于是非问，答错了问题类型。
